entries.title: 1) what
entries.summary: 1) what Andrej Karpathy: Personal update: I've joined Anthropic. I think the next few years at the frontier of LLMs will be especially formative. I am very excited to join the team here and get back to R&D. I remain deeply passionate about education and plan to resume my work on it in time.

entries.title: .@obsdmd asked us to audit their Sync protocol. Our engineers delivered eleven findings. Five went above and beyond the original scope and found syste...
entries.summary: .@obsdmd asked us to audit their Sync protocol. Our engineers delivered eleven findings. Five went above and beyond the original scope and found system-level issues that weren't specific to Sync itself. We see this pattern often with our clients. We respect scope as a delivery contract, but we have a professional obligation to surface what our engineers see. Anything they catch is flagged, and the

entries.summary: OpenAI advances AI content provenance with Content Credentials, SynthID, and a verification tool to help people identify and trust AI-generated media.

entries.title: RT Eugene Yan: Cloudflare on their vulnerabilty discovery harness • Recon: Read the codebase, return an architecture doc • Hunt: ~50 agents look for...
entries.summary: RT Eugene Yan Cloudflare on their vulnerabilty discovery harness • Recon: Read the codebase, return an architecture doc • Hunt: ~50 agents look for bugs concurrently • Validate: Independent agents try to disprove findings • Gapfill: Areas that need a 2nd pass are flagged • Dedup: Findings with the same root cause combined • Trace: Confirms if attacker input reaches the bug • Feedback: If reachable

entries.summary: Glaucous-winged Gull, Brown Pelican, Snowy Egret, Canada Goose, in Los Angeles River, CA, US I'm heading home from PyCon US today so I went on a last morning walk to try and spot a pelican.
